results.rendered_html: maha—rtvij or maha-rtvij, m. ‘great priest’, N. of the 4 chief priests or Ṛtvij (viz. the Hotṛ, Udgātṛ, Adhvaryu and Brahman),  Br. ;  ŚrS.

results.rendered_html: mahartvij (mahā + ṛtvij) und mahatvij ( ŚAT. BR. ) m. so heissen die vier Hauptpriester: Adhvaryu, Brahman, Hotar und Udgātar,  TBR. 3,8,2,4 .  ŚAT. BR. 13,1,1,4 .  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 16,1,7 .  LĀṬY. 4,10,11 .
